priority_bands.name: priority_foundational
priority_bands.meaning: Candidate defines a core concept other reference units depend on.
priority_bands.prohibited_interpretation: public_release, route_creation, sitemap_expansion, draft_creation, publication_right, publication

priority_bands.name: priority_high_dependency
priority_bands.meaning: Candidate supports governance, traceability, or boundary logic required by other candidates.
priority_bands.prohibited_interpretation: public_release, route_creation, sitemap_expansion, draft_creation, publication, route_approval, sitemap_approval, draft_approval, seo_volume_priority

priority_bands.name: priority_ready_for_draft_blueprint
priority_bands.meaning: Candidate may be considered in a future Internal Draft Blueprint sprint after evaluation gates pass.
priority_bands.prohibited_interpretation: public_release, route_creation, sitemap_expansion, draft_creation_now, page_creation, route_activation, publication

priority_bands.name: priority_needs_boundary_refinement
priority_bands.meaning: Candidate requires clearer governance boundary before draft blueprint work.
priority_bands.notes: Refinement required; not blocked permanently unless escalated.

priority_bands.name: priority_needs_claim_scope_refinement
priority_bands.meaning: Candidate claim or source scope needs tightening before drafting.
priority_bands.prohibited_interpretation: public_release, route_creation, sitemap_expansion, draft_creation, publication, external_claim_expansion

priority_bands.name: priority_defer
priority_bands.meaning: Candidate deferred until foundational or dependency candidates advance.
priority_bands.prohibited_interpretation: public_release, route_creation, sitemap_expansion, draft_creation, publication, low_quality_score, seo_deprioritization, abandonment
priority_bands.notes: Deferred by governance order; not numeric ranking.

priority_bands.name: priority_blocked
priority_bands.meaning: Candidate blocked by unresolved governance or safety issues.
priority_bands.prohibited_interpretation: public_release, route_creation, sitemap_expansion, draft_creation, publication, permanent_rejection_without_review, publication_block_override
